content.description:
Sophisticated search beyond simple string matching.

## Features

- Fuzzy matching (typo-tolerant)
- Stemming (find "running" when searching "run")
- Boolean queries (`work AND urgent NOT completed`)
- Field-specific search (search within `content.description` only)
- Ranking and relevance scoring

## Implementation Options

| Approach | Pros | Cons |
|----------|------|------|
| **Build custom** | Full control | Significant effort |
| **Lunr.js** | Client-side, lightweight | Basic features |
| **FlexSearch** | Fast, configurable | Larger library |
| **MiniSearch** | Small, good API | Fewer features |

## Current State

The `item-search-lib` library provides basic string matching with `type:`, `tag:`, and `#` prefix filters. This covers most use cases.

## Priority

Low — current search is sufficient. Add sophistication only when it becomes a clear pain point.
